chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ لَهُ الْجَارِيَةُ يَطَؤُهَا فَتَحْبَلُ فَيَتَّهِمُهَا .
chapter_title.en: Chapter 129 – The man happens to have a slave girl, so he sleeps with her, and she falls pregnant, so he accuses her

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْجَارِيَةِ تَكُونُ لِلرَّجُلِ يُطِيفُ بِهَا وَ هِيَ تَخْرُجُ فَتَعْلَقُ قَالَ يَتَّهِمُهَا الرَّجُلُ أَوْ يَتَّهِمُهَا أَهْلُهُ قُلْتُ أَمَّا ظَاهِرَةً فَلَا قَالَ إِذاً لَزِمَهُ الْوَلَدُ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, and Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, altogether, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Saeed Bin Yasaar who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl who happened to be for the man who wandered around and she brought forth (a child), so she attached (it to him)’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The man accused her, or his family accused her?’ I said, ‘As for apparently, so no’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Then, the child is necessitated upon him’.
